member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparison
member.summary: A match between two attributes that should be compared.
member.param: Gets the control attribute which the attribute is supposed to match.
Gets the test attribute which should be compared to the attribute.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparison.#ctor(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparisonSource@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparisonSource@)
member.summary: A match between two attributes that should be compared.
member.param: Gets the control attribute which the attribute is supposed to match.
Gets the test attribute which should be compared to the attribute.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparison.Control
member.summary: Gets the control attribute which the attribute is supposed to match.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparison.Test
member.summary: Gets the test attribute which should be compared to the attribute.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparison.GetAttributeElements
member.summary: Returns the control and test elements which the control and test attributes belongs to.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparisonSource
member.summary: Represents an attribute that can be a source in a comparison.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparisonSource.Attribute
member.summary: Gets the attribute attached to this source.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparisonSource.ElementSource
member.summary: Gets the element source this attribute source is related to.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparisonSource.Path
member.summary: Gets the path to the attribute in the source node tree.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparisonSource.SourceType
member.summary: Gets the source type, e.g. if it is a test or control source.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparisonSource.#ctor(System.String,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource@)
member.summary: Creates an instance of the .
member.param: Name of the attribute.
The source of the element the attribute belongs to.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareDecision
member.summary: Represents the decision of a comparison.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareDecision.Unknown
member.summary: Use when the compare result is unknown.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareDecision.Same
member.summary: Use when the two compared nodes or attributes are the same.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareDecision.Different
member.summary: Use when the two compared nodes or attributes are the different.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareDecision.Skip
member.summary: Use when the comparison should be skipped and any child-nodes or attributes skipped as well.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareDecision.SkipChildren
member.summary: Use when the comparison should skip any child-nodes.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareDecision.SkipAttributes
member.summary: Use when the comparison should skip any attributes.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult
member.summary: Represents a result of a comparison.
member.param: Gets the latest of the comparison.
Gets the optional related to the current .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult.#ctor(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareDecision,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiff)
member.summary: Represents a result of a comparison.
member.param: Gets the latest of the comparison.
Gets the optional related to the current .

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult.Decision
member.summary: Gets the latest of the comparison.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult.Diff
member.summary: Gets the optional related to the current .

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult.Unknown
member.summary: Use when the compare result is unknown.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult.Same
member.summary: Use when the two compared nodes or attributes are the same.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult.Skip
member.summary: Use when the comparison should be skipped and any child-nodes or attributes skipped as well.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult.SkipChildren
member.summary: Use when the comparison should skip any child-nodes.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult.SkipAttributes
member.summary: Use when the comparison should skip any attributes.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult.Different
member.summary: Use when the two compared nodes or attributes are the different.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult.FromDiff(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiff)
member.summary: Use when the two compared nodes or attributes are the different.
member.param: The associated describing the difference.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult.IsSameOrSkip
member.summary: Checks if a is either a or .

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison
member.summary: Represent a comparison between two nodes.
member.param: Gets the control source in the comparison.
Gets the test source in the comparison.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison.#ctor(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource@)
member.summary: Represent a comparison between two nodes.
member.param: Gets the control source in the comparison.
Gets the test source in the comparison.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison.Control
member.summary: Gets the control source in the comparison.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison.Test
member.summary: Gets the test source in the comparison.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison.AreNodeTypesEqual
member.summary: Gets whether the control and test nodes are of the same type and has the same name.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison.TryGetNodesAsType``1(``0@,``0@)
member.summary: Try to get the control and test node as the type. Returns true if both test and control node is of type , false otherwise.
member.typeparam: THe type of node to try to retrieve.
member.returns: Returns true if both test and control node is of type , false otherwise.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource
member.summary: Represents a node source in a comparison.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource.PathSeparatorChar
member.summary: Gets the character used as a separator in paths.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource.Node
member.summary: Gets the node represented by the source.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource.Index
member.summary: Gets the node's absolute index/position in the DOM tree.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource.#ctor(AngleSharp.Dom.INode,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSourceType)
member.summary: Creates a .
member.param: The node of the source.
The source type.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource.#ctor(AngleSharp.Dom.INode,System.Int32,System.String,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSourceType)
member.summary: Creates a .
member.param: The node of the source.
The node's absolute index/position in the DOM tree
The path to the parent node in the DOM tree.
The source type.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource.GetNodePathSegment(AngleSharp.Dom.INode)
member.summary: Create the last part of the node's path.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource.CombinePath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Combines a parent path with a path segment.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a comparison.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffResult.Different
member.summary: Used when the sources in a comparison are different.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffResult.Missing
member.summary: Used when the test source in a comparison is missing.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffResult.Unexpected
member.summary: Used when the test source in a comparison is was not expected.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttrDiff
member.summary: Represents an attribute difference.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttrDiff.Kind
member.summary: Gets the kind of the diff.

member.summary: Creates an .

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttrDiffKind
member.summary: Defines the reason for two attributes to be the different.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttrDiffKind.Unspecified
member.summary: The attribute difference is unspecified.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttrDiffKind.Name
member.summary: The name of the attribute is different.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttrDiffKind.Value
member.summary: The value of the attribute is different.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CommentDiff
member.summary: Represents a difference between two nodes.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CommentDiff.#ctor(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison@)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffBase`1
member.summary: Represents a difference found during comparison.
member.param: Gets the control source in the comparison.
Gets the test source in the comparison.
Gets the target type in that failed the comparison.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffBase`1.#ctor(`0,`0,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffTarget)
member.summary: Represents a difference found during comparison.
member.param: Gets the control source in the comparison.
Gets the test source in the comparison.
Gets the target type in that failed the comparison.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffBase`1.Control
member.summary: Gets the control source in the comparison.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffBase`1.Test
member.summary: Gets the test source in the comparison.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffBase`1.Target
member.summary: Gets the target type in that failed the comparison.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Diffs.ElementDiff
member.summary: Represents an element difference.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Diffs.ElementDiff.Kind
member.summary: Gets the kind of the diff.

member.summary: Creates an .

member.summary: Defines the reason of two elements to be different.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Diffs.ElementDiffKind.Unspecified
member.summary: The attribute difference is unspecified.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Diffs.ElementDiffKind.Name
member.summary: The type/name of the elements are different.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Diffs.ElementDiffKind.ClosingStyle
member.summary: The two elements have difference tag closing styles.

member.summary: Represents a missing attribute in a test node.

member.summary: Represents a missing node or attribute in the test DOM tree.

member.summary: Represents a missing node or attribute in the test DOM tree.

member.summary: Gets the control source that has the missing item.

member.summary: Gets the target type in that failed the comparison.

member.summary: Creates a .

member.summary: Creates a .

member.summary: Represents an unexpected attribute found in the test DOM tree.

member.summary: Creates a .

member.summary: Represents an unexpected node or attribute in the test DOM tree.

Gets the target type in that failed the comparison.

member.summary: Represents an unexpected node or attribute in the test DOM tree.

member.summary: The source of the unexpected item in the test DOM tree.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffTarget
member.summary: Represent a target of a comparison.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffTarget.None
member.summary: The target is not known.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffTarget.Attribute
member.summary: The target is an attribute.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffTarget.Comment
member.summary: The target is a comment.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffTarget.Element
member.summary: The target is an element.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffTarget.Node
member.summary: The target is a node.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.DiffTarget.Text
member.summary: The target is a text node.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.NodeTypeExtensions
member.summary: Helper methods for working with .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.NodeTypeExtensions.ToDiffTarget(AngleSharp.Dom.NodeType)
member.summary: Gets the diff target based on the node type.
member.param: Mode type to get the diff target off.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.FilterDecision
member.summary: Represents a filter decision made by a filter.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.FilterDecision.Keep
member.summary: Indicates the node or attribute should be part of the comparison.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.FilterDecision.Exclude
member.summary: Indicates the node or attribute should be excluded from the comparison.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.FilterDecisionExtensions
member.summary: Helper methods for .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.FilterDecisionExtensions.IsExclude(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.FilterDecision)
member.summary: Gets whether the is .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.FilterDecisionExtensions.IsKeep(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.FilterDecision)
member.summary: Gets whether the is .

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.HtmlDifferenceEngine
member.summary: Represents the engine that drives the diffing/comparison of two DOM trees.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.HtmlDifferenceEngine.#ctor(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffingStrategy,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection)
member.summary: Creates a diffing engine which will perform a comparison of the control and test sources, using the provided strategies.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.HtmlDifferenceEngine.Compare
member.summary: Executes the comparison and returns any differences found.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IComparisonSource
member.summary: Represents a node or attribute that can be one part of a comparison.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IComparisonSource.Path
member.summary: Gets the path to the node or attribute. The format is similar to a CSS selector, where the (n) in node(n) represents the items position in the DOM tree, relative to other items.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IComparisonSource.SourceType
member.summary: Gets whether the source is from the control or test DOM tree.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiff
member.summary: Represents a difference in a comparison.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiff.Result
member.summary: Gets the difference type, i.e. , , or .

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiff.Target
member.summary: Gets the target type in that failed the comparison, e.g. or .

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffContext
member.summary: The diffing context provides access to the control and test DOM tree during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffContext.QueryControlNodes(System.String)
member.summary: Query the control nodes using a CSS selector.
member.param: The CSS selector to use in the query.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffContext.QueryTestNodes(System.String)
member.summary: Query the test nodes using a CSS selector.
member.param: The CSS selector to use in the query.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffingStrategy
member.summary: This interface needs to be implemented if you want to provide your own diffing strategies used by the during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffingStrategy.Filter(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource@)
member.summary: Decides whether a node should be part of the comparison.
member.param: A comparison source for the node
member.returns: true if the node should be part of the comparison, false if the node should be filtered out.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffingStrategy.Filter(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparisonSource@)
member.summary: Decides whether an attribute should be part of the comparison.
member.param: A attribute comparison source for the attribute
member.returns: true if the attribute should be part of the comparison, false if the attribute should be filtered out.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffingStrategy.Match(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffContext,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection)
member.summary: Matches up the control nodes with test nodes in the two input lists. The matched control and test nodes will be compared to each other. Any unmatched control or test nodes will be reported as either or , depending on whether they are control or test nodes.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffingStrategy.Match(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffContext,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap)
member.summary: Matches up the control attributes with test attributes in the two input lists. The matched control and test attributes will be compared to each other. Any unmatched control or test attributes will be reported as either or , depending on whether they are control or test attributes.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffingStrategy.Compare(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison@)
member.summary: Compares the control and test nodes in the object and tells the caller whether they are to be considered or .
member.returns: if the comparison is successful, otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffingStrategy.Compare(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparison@)
member.summary: Compares the control and test attributes in the object and tells the caller whether they are to be considered or .
member.returns: if the comparison is successful, otherwise.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection
member.summary: Represents a collection of sources in a comparison.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection.SourceType
member.summary: Gets the type of the sources in the collection.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of items in the collection.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the source at the specified index.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection.#ctor(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSourceType,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource})
member.summary: Creates a new .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection.#ctor(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSourceType,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource})
member.summary: Creates a new .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection.GetUnmatched(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets all the unmatched sources in the collection, starting from the specified index (default: 0).

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection.GetAllSources
member.summary: Gets all the sources originally in the collection, even those removed and those marked as matched.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection.MarkAsMatched(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource@)
member.summary: Mark a source as matched. After it has been marked, it will not be returned by .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection.Remove(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollectionRemovePredicate)
member.summary: Apply a filter predicate to the collection. All matched sources will not be returned by or by .

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollectionRemovePredicate
member.summary: Predicate used to remove matched nodes from a source collection.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap
member.summary: Represents a map of sources.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap.SourceType
member.summary: Gets the type of the sources in the collection.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of items in the map.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the with the specified .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap.#ctor(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource@)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap.Contains(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether the map contains a source with the specified .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap.IsUnmatched(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether the source with the name has been matched.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap.GetUnmatched
member.summary: Gets all the unmatched sources in the map.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap.Remove(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMapRemovePredicate)
member.summary: Removes a source from the map.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap.MarkAsMatched(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparisonSource@)
member.summary: Mark a source as matched.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMapRemovePredicate
member.summary: Represents a delegate for removing sources from a .

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSourceType
member.summary: Represents the source type in a comparison.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSourceType.Control
member.summary: The source type is a control node or attribute.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSourceType.Test
member.summary: The source type is a test node or attribute.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffBuilder
member.summary: Use the to easily set up a comparison of a control and test DOM tree.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffBuilder.Control
member.summary: Gets or sets the control markup string.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffBuilder.Test
member.summary: Gets or sets the test markup string.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffBuilder.Compare(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a with the provided control markup.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffBuilder.WithTest(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the markup used during comparison.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffBuilder.WithOptions(System.Action{AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection})
member.summary: Add any options/strategies that should be used during comparison.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffBuilder.Build
member.summary: Execute the comparison operation and returns any differences found.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffBuilder.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parse the provided markup into a AngleSharp DOM tree.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.CollectionExtensions
member.summary: Helper methods for .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.CollectionExtensions.AddRange``1(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Adds a range of items to the target.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.ElementExtensions
member.summary: Helper methods for types.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.ElementExtensions.TryGetAttrValue(AngleSharp.Dom.IElement,System.String,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Try to get an attribute value off of an element. Returns true when the attribute was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.ElementExtensions.TryGetAttrValue(AngleSharp.Dom.IElement,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Try to get an attribute value off of an element. Returns true when the attribute was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.ElementExtensions.TryGetAttrValue``1(AngleSharp.Dom.IElement,System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Try to get an attribute value off of an element. Returns true when the attribute was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.ElementExtensions.TryGetAttrValue``1(AngleSharp.Dom.IElement,System.String,System.Func{System.String,``0},``0@)
member.summary: Try to get an attribute value off of an element. Returns true when the attribute was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.ElementExtensions.GetInlineOptionOrDefault``1(AngleSharp.Dom.IElement,System.String,``0)
member.summary: Try to get an inline diff option off of an element. Returns true when the attribute was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.ElementExtensions.GetInlineOptionOrDefault(AngleSharp.Dom.IElement,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Try to get an inline diff option off of an element. Returns true when the attribute was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.ElementExtensions.GetInlineOptionOrDefault``1(AngleSharp.Dom.IElement,System.String,System.Func{System.String,``0},``0)
member.summary: Try to get an inline diff option off of an element. Returns true when the attribute was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.ElementExtensions.TryGetNodeIndex(AngleSharp.Dom.INode,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Try to get the index of the node in its parent's ChildNodes list. Returns true if index was found. False otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.ElementExtensions.GetParents(AngleSharp.Dom.INode)
member.summary: Gets all parents of a node, starting with the nearest node.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.EmptyHtmlCollection`1
member.summary: Represents an empty .

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.EmptyHtmlCollection`1.Empty
member.summary: Gets an instance of the .

member.summary: Helper methods for enums

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.NodeExtensions
member.summary: Helper methods for working with AngleSharp nodes.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.NodeExtensions.HasAttributes(AngleSharp.Dom.INode)
member.summary: Gets whether the has attributes.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.NodeExtensions.TryGetAttr(AngleSharp.Dom.INode,System.String,AngleSharp.Dom.IAttr@)
member.summary: Try to get an attribute with the from the . Returns true if the attribute exists, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.NodeExtensions.TryGetAttrValue(AngleSharp.Dom.INode,System.String,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Try to get an attribute value off of an node. Returns true when the attribute was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.NodeExtensions.TryGetAttrValue(AngleSharp.Dom.INode,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Try to get an attribute value off of an element. Returns true when the attribute was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.NodeExtensions.TryGetAttrValue``1(AngleSharp.Dom.INode,System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Try to get an attribute value off of an element. Returns true when the attribute was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.NodeExtensions.TryGetAttrValue``1(AngleSharp.Dom.INode,System.String,System.Func{System.String,``0},``0@)
member.summary: Try to get an attribute value off of an element. Returns true when the attribute was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.NodeExtensions.IsSameTypeAs(AngleSharp.Dom.INode,AngleSharp.Dom.INode)
member.summary: Gets whether two nodes is of the same type (NodeType) and has the same name (NodeName).

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Extensions.UnexpectedDOMTreeStructureException
member.summary: Represents an exception that is thrown when a part of the DOM tree is not as expected. Generally not supposed to happen.

member.summary: Creates an instance of the .

member.summary: Creates a comparison source from a node.

member.summary: Represents a reusable HTML differ, that can be configured and used to perform multiple different comparisons.

member.summary: Creates a with the provided strategy.

member.summary: Attribute compare strategy.

member.summary: Attribute name matcher strategy

member.summary: Attribute name matcher strategy.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.BooleanAttributeComparer
member.summary: Boolean attribute comparer strategy.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.BooleanAttributeComparer.BooleanAttributes
member.summary: Gets a collection of names of all attributes the strategy considers as boolean attributes.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.BooleanAttributeComparer.#ctor(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.BooleanAttributeComparision)
member.summary: Creates a instance of the .

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.BooleanAttributeComparer.Compare(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparison@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult)
member.summary: The boolean attribute comparer strategy.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.BooleanAttributeComparision
member.summary: Controls the type of comparison performed by the .

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.BooleanAttributeComparision.Loose
member.summary: Tells the to just assert that a boolean attribute exists, independent of its value.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.BooleanAttributeComparision.Strict
member.summary: Tells the to verify that the attribute is both a boolean attribute and that its value is legal.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.ClassAttributeComparer
member.summary: Represents the class attribute comparer strategy.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.ClassAttributeComparer.Compare(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparison@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult)
member.summary: The class attribute comparer strategy.

member.summary: The ignore attribute comparer.

member.summary: Represents the ignore diff attribute filter.

member.summary: The ignore diff attribute filter.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.OrderingStyleAttributeComparer
member.summary: Represents the style attribute comparer strategy which orders the styles before comparing them.

member.summary: The style attribute comparer strategy.

member.summary: The style attribute comparer strategy.

member.summary: Represents the comment comparer strategy.

member.summary: The comment comparer strategy.

member.summary: Represents the ignore comment filter strategy.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.CommentStrategies.IgnoreCommentsFilter.Filter(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.FilterDecision)
member.summary: The ignore comment filter strategy.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.CompareStrategy`1
member.summary:
Represent a comparison strategy that takes matched nodes or attributes and perform a comparison of them.
If the comparer does not have an opinion on whether two matched nodes or attributes are the same, it should just return the current decision provided via the input parameter.
member.typeparam: The type of comparison to perform, i.e. either or .
member.param: The comparison.
The current decision from any previous comparer or the initial decision.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.DiffingStrategyPipeline
member.summary: Represents a and a . Use the pipeline to invoke the strategies registered within it as a pipeline, one at the time.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.DiffingStrategyPipeline.HasMatchers
member.summary: Gets whether the pipeline have any matchers registered.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.DiffingStrategyPipeline.HasComparers
member.summary: Gets whether the pipeline has any comparers registered.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.CssSelectorElementMatcher
member.summary: Represents the CSS selector element matcher.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.CssSelectorElementMatcher.Match(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffContext,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection)
member.summary: The CSS selector element matcher.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.DiffMatchSelectorReturnedTooManyResultsException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a the cannot find the test node specified in the control node.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.DiffMatchSelectorReturnedTooManyResultsException.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a .

member.summary: Creates a .

member.summary: Creates a .

member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.ElementComparer
member.summary: Represents the element comparer strategy.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.ElementComparer.EnforceTagClosing
member.summary: Gets whether or not the closing style of an element is considered during comparison.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.ElementComparer.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates an instance of the .
member.param: Whether or not the closing style of an element is considered during comparison.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.ElementComparer.Compare(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult)
member.summary: The element comparer strategy.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.IgnoreAttributesElementComparer
member.summary: Represents the ignore attributes element comparer.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.IgnoreAttributesElementComparer.Compare(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult)
member.summary: The ignore attributes element comparer.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.IgnoreChildrenElementComparer
member.summary: Represents the ignore children element comparer.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.IgnoreChildrenElementComparer.Compare(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult)
member.summary: The ignore children element comparer.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.IgnoreElementComparer
member.summary: Represents the ignore element comparer.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.ElementStrategies.IgnoreElementComparer.Compare(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult)
member.summary: The ignore element comparer.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.FilterStrategy`1
member.summary:
Represents a filter that will inspect the source and decide whether or not it should be included in the comparison.
If the filter does not have an opinion on whether source should be included or not, it should just return the current decision provided via the input parameter.
member.typeparam: The type of source to inspect, i.e. either a or a .
member.param: The source node or attribute.
The current decision from any previous filter or the initial decision.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection
member.summary: Represents a collection of diffing strategies.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection.AddComparer(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.CompareStrategy{AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparison},AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.StrategyType)
member.summary: Adds a attribute comparer to the pipeline. Specialized comparers always execute after any generalized comparers in the pipeline. That enables them to correct for the generic comparers decision.
member.param: true if is a specialized comparer, false if it is a generalized comparer.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection.AddComparer(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.CompareStrategy{AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison},AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.StrategyType)
member.summary: Adds a node comparer to the pipeline. Specialized comparers always execute after any generalized comparers in the pipeline. That enables them to correct for the generic comparers decision.
member.param: true if is a specialized comparer, false if it is a generalized comparer.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection.AddFilter(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.FilterStrategy{AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparisonSource},AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.StrategyType)
member.summary: Adds an attribute filter to the pipeline. Specialized filters always execute after any generalized filters in the pipeline. That enables them to correct for the generic filters decision.
member.param: true if is a specialized filter, false if it is a generalized filter.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection.AddFilter(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.FilterStrategy{AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource},AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.StrategyType)
member.summary: Adds a node filter to the pipeline. Specialized filters always execute after any generalized filters in the pipeline. That enables them to correct for the generic filters decision.
member.param: true if is a specialized filter, false if it is a generalized filter.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection.AddMatcher(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.MatchStrategy{AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison},AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.StrategyType)
member.summary: Adds a node matcher to the pipeline. Specialized matchers always execute before any generalized matchers in the pipeline. This enables the special matchers to handle special matching cases before the more simple generalized matchers process the rest.
member.param: true if is a specialized matcher, false if it is a generalized matcher.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection.AddMatcher(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.MatchStrategy{AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceMap,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.AttributeComparison},AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.StrategyType)
member.summary: Adds an attribute matcher to the pipeline. Specialized matchers always execute before any generalized matchers in the pipeline. This enables the special matchers to handle special matching cases before the more simple generalized matchers process the rest.
member.param: true if is a specialized matcher, false if it is a generalized matcher.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.MatchStrategy`2
member.summary:
Represents a matching strategy used to match two sets of collection of elements or two sets of attributes together into or matches.
The matcher should only match up the sources it knows how to match up. The rest will be handled by other matchers or be left as unmatched and reported as either missing or unexpected by the diffing engine.
member.typeparam: The resulting match type, i.e. or .
member.param: A diffing context that provides methods for querying the control and test DOM tree.
The control sources.
The test sources.
member.returns: Any matches found. Can be lazy populated enumerable, e.g. via yield return.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.NodeStrategies.ForwardSearchingNodeMatcher
member.summary: Represents the forward searching node matcher strategy.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.NodeStrategies.ForwardSearchingNodeMatcher.Match(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffContext,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection)
member.summary: The forward searching node matcher strategy.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.NodeStrategies.OneToOneNodeMatcher
member.summary: Represents the one to one node matcher.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.NodeStrategies.OneToOneNodeMatcher.Match(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.IDiffContext,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.SourceCollection)
member.summary: The one to one node matcher.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.StrategyType
member.summary: Represents a type of strategy in a type.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.StrategyType.Generalized
member.summary: Indicates the strategy is a general strategy, that targets all nodes or attributes.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.StrategyType.Specialized
member.summary: Indicates that the strategy is a specialized strategy, that only targets specific or select nodes or attributes.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.StyleSheetTextNodeComparer
member.summary: Represents the stylesheet text node comparer.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.StyleSheetTextNodeComparer.Compare(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult)
member.summary: The stylesheet text node comparer.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.TextNodeComparer
member.summary: Represents the text node comparer strategy.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.TextNodeComparer.Whitespace
member.summary: Gets the whitespace option of the comparer instance.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.TextNodeComparer.IgnoreCase
member.summary: Gets whether the comparer has been configured to ignore case.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.TextNodeComparer.#ctor(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.WhitespaceOption,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Instantiates a with the provided configuration.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.TextNodeComparer.Compare(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.Comparison@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.CompareResult)
member.summary: The text node comparer strategy.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.TextNodeFilter
member.summary: Represents the text node filter strategy.

member.name: P:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.TextNodeFilter.Whitespace
member.summary: Gets the whitespace option of the filter instance.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.TextNodeFilter.#ctor(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.WhitespaceOption)
member.summary: Creates a text node filter with the provided option.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.TextNodeFilter.Filter(AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.ComparisonSource@,AngleSharp.Diffing.Core.FilterDecision)
member.summary: The text node filter strategy.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.WhitespaceOption
member.summary: Represents a whitespace diffing option.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.WhitespaceOption.Preserve
member.summary: Does not change or filter out any whitespace in text nodes the control and test HTML.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.WhitespaceOption.RemoveWhitespaceNodes
member.summary: Using this option filters out all text nodes that only consist of whitespace characters.

member.name: F:AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.WhitespaceOption.Normalize
member.summary: Using this option will trim all text nodes and replace two or more whitespace characters with a single space character. This option implicitly includes the option.

member.name: T:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Helper methods for registering strategies.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.IgnoreDiffAttributes(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables ignoring of the special "diff"-attributes during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddAttributeNameMatcher(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables the name-based attribute matching strategy during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddAttributeComparer(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables the basic name and value attribute comparer during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddClassAttributeComparer(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables the special class attribute comparer during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddBooleanAttributeComparer(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection,AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.AttributeStrategies.BooleanAttributeComparision)
member.summary: Enables the special boolean attribute comparer during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddStyleAttributeComparer(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables the special style attributes comparer during diffing.
member.param: Then the flag is true, the comparer orders the styles in ascending order before comparing them. Therefore two styles are identical if they have the same properties and values but in different order.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.IgnoreComments(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables ignoring HTML comments during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddCommentComparer(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables the basic comment comparer, that checks if two nodes are comment nodes. It does not check the content of the comment.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddDefaultOptions(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Sets up the diffing process using the default options.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddElementComparer(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables the basic element comparer, that checks if two nodes are element nodes and have the same name.
member.param: The collection to add the comparer to.
Whether or not the closing style of an element is considered during comparison.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddCssSelectorMatcher(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables the CSS-selector matcher strategy during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddIgnoreElementSupport(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables the ignore element `diff:ignore` attribute during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddIgnoreChildrenElementSupport(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables the ignore children element `diff:ignoreChildren` attribute during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddIgnoreAttributesElementSupport(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables the ignore attributes element `diff:ignoreAttributes` attribute during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddOneToOneNodeMatcher(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables the one-to-one node-matching strategy during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddSearchingNodeMatcher(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables the forward-searching node-matcher strategy during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddTextComparer(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection,AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.TextNodeStrategies.WhitespaceOption,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables the one-to-one node-matching strategy during diffing.

member.name: M:AngleSharp.Diffing.DiffingStrategyPipelineBuilderExtensions.AddStyleSheetComparer(AngleSharp.Diffing.Strategies.IDiffingStrategyCollection)
member.summary: Enables the special style-tag style sheet text comparer.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.IsExternalInit
member.summary: Reserved to be used by the compiler for tracking metadata. This class should not be used by developers in source code.
member.remarks: This definition is provided by the IsExternalInit NuGet package (https://www.nuget.org/packages/IsExternalInit). Please see https://github.com/manuelroemer/IsExternalInit for more information.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.AllowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is allowed as an input even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DisallowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is disallowed as an input even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter may be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the output will be non-null if the named parameter is non-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the associated parameter name.
member.param: The associated parameter name. The output will be non-null if the argument to the parameter specified is non-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullIfNotNullAttribute.ParameterName
member.summary: Gets the associated parameter name.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnAttribute
member.summary: Applied to a method that will never return under any circumstance.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method will not return if the associated Boolean parameter is passed the specified value.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified parameter value.
member.param: The condition parameter value. Code after the method will be considered unreachable by diagnostics if the argument to the associated parameter matches this value.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DoesNotReturnIfAttribute.ParameterValue
member.summary: Gets the condition parameter value.
